mock_news_batch.title: Micron Technology Reports Record Revenue in Q2
mock_news_batch.content: Micron Technology (MU) reported record revenue driven by HBM demand in data centers. The company raised guidance for next quarter.

mock_news_batch.title: 美联储维持利率不变 市场波动加剧
mock_news_batch.content: 美联储宣布维持基准利率在当前水平不变，会后声明释放偏鸽派信号。标普500指数尾盘拉升，VIX恐慌指数回落。

mock_news_batch.title: 油价小幅上涨 OPEC+维持减产
mock_news_batch.content: WTI原油期货收涨0.8%，OPEC+会议决定维持当前减产规模至下季度。
某明星离婚后首次公开亮相，引发网友热议

mock_news_batch.title: Google Announces New AI Model Gemini 3.0
mock_news_batch.content: Alphabet's Google unveiled Gemini 3.0, the next generation AI model with improved reasoning and multimodal capabilities. The model is expected to be integrated across Google products.

results.summary: 美光科技创纪录营收，HBM 需求推动
results.cot_reasoning: 美光是跟踪标的，营收创纪录直接影响股价，HBM需求是半导体核心主题。重要性高。

results.summary: 美联储维持利率，偏鸽信号
results.cot_reasoning: 美联储决议影响全市场走向，偏鸽信号对科技股正面。但不是直接标的相关。
Google是跟踪标的GOOGL，新AI模型发布是重要产品里程碑。
